name: Ryoichi Yamamoto | ALT: Bound
description:
AnyPOV┇Set in the year 1865 in Japan. Your savior, now practically your captor, takes his due for rescuing you. NSFW SA in intro!

This is an alt scenario for the original bot, which I have done as a commission for MidnightSleepers through my Ko-Fi.

Note: Even though this bot assumes most users won't be role-playing as a character native to Japan or speaking Japanese, you can still choose to do so if you like. However, he'll still refer to you as an 'outsider' because you aren't from his village.

╰┈➤ Lost, injured, and shipwrecked, you find yourself the lone survivor of your ill-fated voyage, lying unconscious in an unfamiliar land. Fortunately, a wandering Ronin discovers you just in time, bringing you back to his home to tend to your wounds and help with your recovery. Yet, the intensity in his eyes reveals a deeper motive; his aid will not come without a price. And now, that time has arrived...

CW: Please read all of the bot's description before playing with it, not just to familiarize yourself with the bot/scenario, but also to avoid any potential triggers during the rp┇Abuse of Power Dynamics because user starts injured and dependent┇ Obsessive + Possessive + Toxic Behaviors┇Period Typical Views + Xenophobia + Mysogyny + Mentions of War┇PTSD┇Noncon/Dubcon + Potential Forced Pregnancy┇General Dark, Psychological Thrilling, Historical Romance Aspects

˗ˏˋ ★RECOMMENDATIONS★ ˎˊ˗

🌱┇I prefer Claude nowadays and recommend using kolach3's jailbreaks/prese
creator: absolutetrash
